brand.sloganFull: **Private inspiration vault + thinking engine.** Capture fragments first; say one sentence to AI on the right to get started—plans, insights, and upgraded notes are written back to local files, not lost in chat.
brand.noAssistantValue: Without an AI assistant, MetaMates is vault-only—no chat and no /today or /graduate commands. Install and sign in to make the thinking engine your daily starting point.
brand.noAssistantHint: Install Gemini, Claude, or CodeBuddy—about 2 minutes to enable the thinking engine.
brand.noAssistantShort: No AI assistant detected. Without one you can only store ideas—no chat or methodology commands.
brand.installStep1: Click Install AI assistant and pick Gemini, Claude, or CodeBuddy
brand.installStep2: Follow the installer; sign in in the terminal or panel on first use
brand.installStep3: When done, chat on the right or run /today for today's plan

appShell.openWorkspaceFirst: Please open your inspiration vault first
appShell.desktopOnly: This feature is only available in the desktop app
appShell.selectWorkspaceDesc: Pick a folder on your computer for notes, diary, and connections
appShell.selectWorkspaceTip1: Use an empty folder, or one that already has Markdown notes
appShell.selectWorkspaceTip2: Do not use the MetaMates install folder or bundled template folders
appShell.selectWorkspaceTip3: MetaMates creates diary, inbox, and project folders on first use
appShell.startupAgentTimeout: Thinking engine still connecting — check the thinking engine panel shortly…
appShell.templateWorkspaceForbidden: The install folder or bundled templates cannot be your vault. Choose your own folder (e.g. E:\MyM2).
appShell.workspaceChatHint: Each vault keeps its own chat history. Switching folders loads that vault's messages.
appShell.acpRedirect: Use slash commands in the thinking engine on the right, e.g. /today or /context.

settings.title: Settings
settings.autoSaveHint: Save note edits automatically to your inspiration vault.
settings.speechEngineHint: Auto uses the Offline Speech extension when installed; otherwise Windows system or online speech. Install the extension below (~130 MB).
settings.pluginOfflineSpeechHint: Local Whisper speech-to-text for the thinking engine input—works offline. Requires a separate extension install.
settings.timezoneInvalid: Invalid timezone—pick a valid entry (e.g. Asia/Shanghai)
settings.timezoneHint: Used for daily plans, journal dates, and when the AI assistant interprets “today” or “tomorrow”.
settings.lightPalettePaperHint: Low-glare warm gray for long reading (default)
settings.lightPaletteColdHint: Cool white similar to default system apps
settings.systemHint: Follows your OS light/dark mode automatically.
settings.vaultApiHint: Runs a local service so your phone browser can clip into the vault, and optionally bridges to Claude Desktop, Cursor, and similar tools (advanced).
settings.calendarPlaceholder: Select .ics file, or leave empty to scan your inspiration vault
settings.calendarHint: Import an iCalendar (.ics) file; leave empty to scan schedule-related notes in your vault. Today's event count appears in the status bar.
settings.mobileReaderLanHint: On the same WiFi, open the URL below in your phone browser, or scan the QR code.
settings.mobileReaderLanEmpty: No LAN IP detected. Connect to WiFi and enable LAN access.
settings.mobileReaderLanPending: Click Save to apply LAN access
settings.mobileReaderSaveToConnect: Your phone cannot connect until the service is running. Enable Mobile capture & bridge, click Save, then wait for the green running status.
settings.mobileReaderFirewallHint: If the phone still cannot connect, allow MetaMates or TCP port 17333 in Windows Firewall (Private network).
settings.vaultApiNotRunning: Capture service is not running. Click Save to start it.
settings.vaultApiNoWorkspace: Open your inspiration vault before enabling capture
settings.vaultApiLanHint: Allow LAN access (phone on same WiFi can capture—trusted networks only)
settings.ollamaHint: When enabled, the thinking engine can use a local Ollama server (Ollama must already be running).
settings.engineDisplayNameHint: Shown on the empty-state button and right toolbar. Empty or “2M” counts as unnamed—you may still see a naming prompt.
settings.engineDisplayNameIsDefault: 2M is already the default — pick a personal name
settings.cliAgentsHint: Install or remove assistants and choose which appear in the thinking engine. Cards above show connection and sign-in status.
settings.agentCliEmpty: No installed AI assistants detected yet
settings.agentCliAuthHintClaude: Sign in to Claude, or set an API key in Claude’s official config.
settings.agentCliAuthHintGemini: Sign in to Gemini, or add a Gemini API key in MetaMates.
settings.agentCliAuthHintNotInstalled: {{name}} is not installed yet—use Install & manage AI assistants first.
settings.agentCliHint: Model and API settings follow each assistant’s official config; MetaMates does not override assistant-locked values.
settings.syncCliSkillsHint: Fill missing /today, /graduate, and other command guides for installed assistants. Existing files are not overwritten.
settings.mcpHint: Connect external tools (databases, browsers, etc.) to the thinking engine. Vault bridge is added automatically when capture is on.
settings.mcpReconnectHint: Reloaded AI assistant sessions to apply extension changes
settings.mcpReconnectPartial: Some AI assistants failed to reload
settings.pluginDocumentImportHint: Import PDF, Word, Excel, and image OCR into intelligence notes. txt / md / html / csv / json work without this extension.
settings.pluginDocumentImportFootnote: Extensions install to your local user folder and do not block app updates. Open source: github.com/qdljywz/MetaMates
settings.pluginDocumentImportRequired: Install the Document Import extension to import PDF, Word, Excel, or images.
settings.pluginOfflineSpeechRequired: Install the Offline Speech extension to use local Whisper.
settings.pluginInstallError404: Extension package not found. Check that the matching GitHub Release is published.
settings.pluginInstallErrorNetwork: Extension download failed. Check your network and try again.
settings.pluginInstallErrorGeneric: Extension install failed. Please try again later.
settings.pluginBundledZipHint: Extension zip found in the app bundle — local install is tried first; otherwise GitHub download.
settings.themeShortcutHint: Ctrl+Shift+L cycles light / dark / system theme

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.hint: This panel could not be displayed. Try refreshing, or restart the app.
